news.title: Oriental Launches Second-Generation SiC MOSFET Series
news.summary: Oriental Semiconductor announces the release of its second-generation silicon carbide MOSFET series featuring improved RDS(on) and switching performance for EV and renewable energy applications.
news.content:
Oriental Semiconductor has officially launched the OSiC Gen2 series, a new family of silicon carbide MOSFETs featuring significant performance improvements over the first generation. The Gen2 series includes 650V and 1200V devices with RDS(on) reduced by 20-30% compared to Gen1 products.

Key improvements of the OSiC Gen2 series include:

- Reduced RDS(on): 20-30% lower than Gen1 products
- Improved switching performance: 15% lower switching losses
- Enhanced gate oxide reliability for automotive applications
- Higher surge current capability
- Improved body diode reverse recovery characteristics
- Compatible with standard and Kelvin source packages

The Gen2 series is specifically optimized for electric vehicle onboard chargers, solar inverters, and high-density power supplies. Devices are available in TO-247-3 and TO-247-4 packages, with automotive-grade versions (AEC-Q101) scheduled for release in Q2 2026.

Sampling is available now for qualified customers. LiTong Electronics, as an authorized Oriental distributor, provides technical evaluation support and design consultation for SiC applications.

news.title: Oriental Expands Automotive IGBT Module Portfolio
news.summary: Oriental introduces new automotive-grade IGBT modules targeting 150-200kW EV motor drive applications with enhanced power cycling capability.
news.content:
Oriental Semiconductor has expanded its automotive IGBT module portfolio with the introduction of the OIM-A series for high-power EV motor drive applications. The new modules target the growing demand for 150-200kW traction inverters in premium electric vehicles.

The expanded OIM-A series includes:

- OIM400A-12E4: 400A 1200V for 150-200kW applications
- OIM450A-12E4: 450A 1200V for high-torque EV platforms
- OIM600A-06E4: 600A 650V for 800V EV architectures

All modules feature:
- AEC-Q101 qualification with full automotive traceability
- Enhanced power cycling capability for EV duty cycles
- Low saturation voltage (1.6V typical at 150°C)
- Integrated NTC temperature sensor
- Press-fit pins for reliable assembly
- RoHS compliant and halogen-free

The modules have been validated by multiple Tier-1 automotive suppliers and are in production for several EV platforms launching in 2026-2027.

LiTong Electronics provides comprehensive support including evaluation kits, reference designs, and application engineering for Oriental automotive products.

news.title: Oriental Selected as Power Device Supplier for Major EV Manufacturer
news.summary: Strategic partnership announced between Oriental Semiconductor and a leading global EV manufacturer for supply of IGBT and SiC power devices.
news.content:
Oriental Semiconductor has entered into a strategic partnership with a leading global electric vehicle manufacturer to supply IGBT modules and SiC MOSFETs for their next-generation vehicle platforms.

Under the multi-year agreement, Oriental will provide:

- High-volume supply of automotive-grade IGBT modules
- Customized SiC MOSFETs for onboard charger applications
- Technical collaboration on next-generation power module development
- Dedicated capacity allocation and supply security
- Joint development of advanced packaging technologies

The partnership represents a significant milestone for Oriental, validating the quality and reliability of its automotive power devices on the global stage. The EV manufacturer cited Oriental's competitive technology, cost-effectiveness, and supply security as key factors in the selection.

Production ramp-up is scheduled to begin in Q3 2026, with peak volumes expected to reach millions of units annually by 2028.

LiTong Electronics will support this partnership by providing local inventory, technical support, and logistics services for the EV supply chain.

news.title: Oriental Announces Major Capacity Expansion Investment
news.summary: Oriental Semiconductor announces $500M investment to expand manufacturing capacity for IGBT and SiC devices to meet growing demand.
news.content:
Oriental Semiconductor has announced a major capacity expansion plan with a $500 million investment over the next three years. The investment addresses the rapidly growing demand for power semiconductors in electric vehicles, renewable energy, and industrial applications.

The expansion plan includes:

- New 12-inch wafer fab for IGBT and MOSFET production
- Dedicated SiC wafer processing line
- Advanced packaging and testing facilities
- R&D center for next-generation device development
- Supply chain and logistics infrastructure

Key capacity targets:

- IGBT module capacity to increase by 150% by 2028
- SiC device capacity to increase by 300% by 2028
- Total power device output to reach 5 million units per month

The expansion will significantly improve Oriental's ability to meet customer demand and reduce lead times. First production from the new facilities is expected in Q2 2027.

LiTong Electronics customers will benefit from improved product availability and shorter lead times as this additional capacity comes online.

news.title: Oriental Releases Complete Reference Design for Industrial Motor Drives
news.summary: New reference design provides complete solution for 30-75kW variable frequency drives using Oriental IGBT modules and control electronics.
news.content:
Oriental Semiconductor has released a comprehensive reference design for industrial variable frequency drives (VFDs) targeting 30-75kW motor control applications. The reference design provides a complete blueprint for developing high-performance motor drives using Oriental power devices.

The reference design includes:

- Complete schematics for power stage and control electronics
- PCB layout files and Gerber files
- Full BOM with Oriental IGBT modules and recommended components
- Source code for motor control algorithms (V/f and vector control)
- Technical documentation and application notes
- Evaluation kit with pre-programmed control board

Key specifications:

- Input: 380V AC three-phase (±15%)
- Output: 30-75kW (configurable)
- Switching frequency: 2-16kHz adjustable
- Control modes: V/f, sensorless vector, torque control
- Efficiency: >96% at rated load
- Protection: Overcurrent, overvoltage, overtemperature, phase loss

The reference design is available now to qualified customers through Oriental's distribution partners.

LiTong Electronics provides technical support for the reference design including design customization, troubleshooting assistance, and production support.
